finding: clean: toggle click logic and useLayoutEffect root-bg guard mirror BlankLayout; single root-bg owner per route; useMetaThemeColor('--auth-backdrop') resolves a token defined in :root and .dark

clean: useTheme() only throws without ThemeProvider; AuthScreenLayout/AuthThemeToggle render only inside AuthPage/SetupPage, both under the app-root + gallery ThemeProvider; SetupPage used useTheme pre-change
clean: reactive Stores.* reads at component top-level; no store read inside .map()/loop/conditional; AuthScreenLayout/AuthThemeToggle read no stores
clean: exactly one <main> per unauthenticated page (no router layout on /auth or /setup); toggle keeps aria-label; asserted by getByRole('main').toHaveCount(1)
clean: one meta[theme-color] owner per route after removing layout:BlankLayout from /setup; layout-effect cleanup-before-setup ordering keeps root-bg prev-capture correct across route swaps
clean: no reactive Stores.X proxy access under any .map()/conditional in the changed files
clean: toggle reuses the real theme mechanism (useTheme->setTheme->ConfigClient/ThemeProvider) verbatim from the former SetupThemeSwitcher; container + z-indices identical across both hosts
login renders its Title above the card while setup renders its Title inside the Card, so header placement still diverges between the two screens
status: rejected: pre-existing content difference, out of theming scope; the shared chrome (backdrop/toggle/landmark/container) is what makes them twins; register mode's inner title is owned by RegisterForm

finding: clean: BlankLayout's three behaviors (main landmark, useMetaThemeColor, synchronous flash-guard) faithfully folded in; edge var retargeted --background -> --auth-backdrop since the backdrop paints the edges
dynamic data-testid prop dropped both toggle ids from the regex-scanned testid registry, losing compile-time typo protection
status: fixed: replaced the dynamic prop with one static literal data-testid="auth-theme-toggle"; regenerated registry now contains it (DRIFT-2.2)

finding: clean: removing router layout:BlankLayout from /setup and the self-wrapped BlankLayoutComponent from AuthPage is safe — AuthScreenLayout supplies the single main + meta-color + flash-guard, no affordance lost
clean: card fits the container (Card w-full inside layout's z-10 w-full max-w-md, no competing max-width); z-stacking backdrop -z-0 < content z-10 < toggle z-20 correct and clickable
toggle rendered Button size=icon (size-8 = 32x32px) but TEST-6 asserts >=40px and the mobile tap-target guideline wants larger, so TEST-6 would FAIL and the target was too small
status: fixed: added size-11 (44px) to the toggle className (overrides the kit icon size via tailwind-merge); TEST-6 now measures a real >=40px target (DRIFT-2.1)

finding: absolute top-4/right-4 toggle sits near the top-right corner of the tall setup card at ~390px
status: rejected: card is vertically centered (min-h-dvh), so at 390x844 its top is well below the 44px toggle band; TEST-6 asserts no toggle/card intersection and passes (verified Phase 8)

finding: clean: no horizontal-scroll/backdrop-bleed at 390px — main is min-h-dvh overflow-hidden p-4, content caps at max-w-md but w-full so shrinks below viewport, absolute inset-0 backdrop clipped by overflow-hidden
clean: TEST-1 exercises a REAL toggle.click(), polls isDarkMode (html.dark), verifies persistence via getTheme and reload survival — proves a user click, not just the setTheme helper
metaThemeColor poll waits for existence not the theme-specific value; safe only because index.html ships no static meta[theme-color] so the tag is created on the first rAF
status: rejected: verified index.html has no static meta[theme-color]; the value is set by useMetaThemeColor's rAF before the poll resolves; documented as a known precondition

finding: clean: brace-balanced block() parser anchors on 'selector {' (escapes '.' in .dark, skips the @custom-variant dark mention); light!=dark value assertion is real not tautological
clean: page.evaluate only reads DOM/computed-style/localStorage; no secrets/tokens/network mocks/injection surface
clean: /setup keeps requiresAuth:false; no permission introduced or altered; only the layout wrapper changed
clean: specs use real createAdminViaSetup/logoutAndGoToAuth flows and real endpoints; no e2e route.mock targeting a non-existent route
clean: single reused auth-clouds.webp raster + static darkening layer; no unbounded render; useMetaThemeColor rAF is one-shot
aria-label 'Switch to light/dark theme' is hardcoded English
status: rejected: ported verbatim from SetupThemeSwitcher; the whole app is English-hardcoded (no i18n layer); no regression

finding: clean: --auth-backdrop declared in :root + .dark following the existing token style (hsl), kept out of @theme inline since it is decorative and used only via var(); check:design-spec green
clean: two new 'via' coverage entries for AuthScreenLayout + AuthThemeToggle mirror existing sibling entries; check:gallery-coverage + check:state-matrix green after regen
clean: mechanically regenerated registry (gen:testid-registry) now includes auth-theme-toggle; check:testid-registry green

clean (iteration r1): login heading moved INSIDE the card as Title level=2, mirroring SetupPage's in-card Title level=2; Title imported; register bumped to level 2; AuthPage external title removed (fixes register double-header). One heading per screen. TEST-8 asserts card-descendant containment + count-1 + old-title-gone. No regression.
clean (iteration r1): exactly one heading per unauthenticated screen after removing AuthPage's external title; heading level consistent (2) across login/register/setup

clean (iteration r1): TEST-8 scopes getByRole('heading') to loginCard/registerCard (proves DESCENDANT containment, not mere presence), asserts exactly one heading, and that the old external 'Create your account' is gone
